response: Japan, a nation with a population of 125 million, has a gross domestic product (GDP) of $4.2 trillion and reported a 1.1% GDP growth rate, paired with 2.6% unemployment and 3.2% inflation. Complementing these economic figures are key metrics including a 263% debt-to-GDP ratio, an average life expectancy of 84.6 years, and total annual exports valued at $756 billion.
